title: Library Crate Structure
text:
[REQ-0001] The crate MUST be a library crate (`lib.rs`); it MUST NOT include a binary entry point.

[REQ-0002] The crate MUST expose a public `Agent` type as its primary entry point for embedding applications.

[REQ-0003] The crate MUST NOT depend on any global mutable state; all configuration and runtime state MUST be encapsulated within the `Agent` instance.

**Rationale:**
A library crate allows embedding applications to host the agent in-process without a separate binary. Avoiding global state allows multiple `Agent` instances to coexist in the same process if needed, and simplifies testing.
